title: Parity: oscore (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: oscore. Rust: complete (1888 LoC). Zephyr: complete (2794 LoC). Python: partial (1214 LoC in crypto/). Gap: Python OSCORE is in crypto module, not standalone oscore module. May lack full replay protection and context management found in Rust/Zephyr.
